title: Basic JavaScript Accessibility (a11y)
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Accessibility (a11y). Focus on implementing ARIA roles and attributes correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Accessibility (a11y)
description: Create a function that uses ARIA roles and attributes and Keyboard navigation together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Accessibility (a11y) Project
description: Build a small application that applies ARIA roles and attributes, Keyboard navigation, Focus management in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Accessibility (a11y)
description: The following code has bugs related to ARIA roles and attributes. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Accessibility (a11y)
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with ARIA roles and attributes and Keyboard navigation.
